rows.notes: P48 preserves the descendant-only merge posture from P45.
P48 treats the parked root checkout as quarantine-only rather than as a promotion base.
The published post-H60 clean descendant should remain available as the preserved source branch.
The source branch should track an upstream before later promotion planning continues.
Promotion prep should be recorded from a clean descendant worktree state, excluding current-wave exporter outputs.
